testcase.name: verifyLoginLogout

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button class="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-neutral/20 transition-colors p-2" type="button" id="radix-_r_6_" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="true" data-state="open" data-slot="dropdown-menu-trigger" aria-controls="radix-_r_7_">...</button> is not clickable at point (1156, 39).
